  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5, b6 (height 2, b5 on table, b6 on b5)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b7, b8, b9, b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15 (height 9, b7 on table)

    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)

      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: b1 (height 1)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: b2 (height 1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: b3 (height 1)
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: b4 (height 1)
    (on-table b4)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 5: b5, b6 (height 2, b5 on table, b6 on b5)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 6: b7, b8, b9, b10, b11, b12, b13, b14, b15 (height 9, b7 on table)
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (clear b15)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1: b1 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2: b2 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3: b3 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4: b4 on table (already satisfied, single block)
      (on-table b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5: b6 on table, b5 on b6 (inverted)
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      
      ;; Tower 6: b15 on table, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, ..., b7 on b8 (inverted)
      (on-table b15)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
    )
  )
)

positive_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1, b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 1, b2 on table
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 1, b3 on table
    (on-table b3)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 2, b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 3, b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 6: height 5, b9 on table, b10 on b9, b11 on b10, b12 on b11, b13 on b12
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (clear b13)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b2 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b3 on top (already on table, so just clear)
      (on-table b3)
      (clear b3)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on top of b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b8 on table, b7 on b8, b6 on b7
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 6 inverted: b13 on table, b12 on b13, b11 on b12, b10 on b11, b9 on b10
      (on-table b13)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (clear b9)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 3): b4 on table, b5 on b4, b6 on b5
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (clear b6)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 5): b7 on table, b8 on b7, b9 on b8, b10 on b9, b11 on b10
    (on-table b7)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (clear b11)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 7): b12 on table, b13 on b12, b14 on b13, b15 on b14, b16 on b15, b17 on b16, b18 on b17
    (on-table b12)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (clear b18)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (height 1, no change)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b6 on table, b5 on b6, b4 on b5
      (on-table b6)
      (on b5 b6)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b11 on table, b10 on b11, b9 on b10, b8 on b9, b7 on b8
      (on-table b11)
      (on b10 b11)
      (on b9 b10)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (clear b7)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b18 on table, b17 on b18, b16 on b17, b15 on b16, b14 on b15, b13 on b14, b12 on b13
      (on-table b18)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (clear b12)
      
      ;; Arm is empty at the end
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)
